build.description: Default coding agent - optimized for implementation

plan.description: Strategic planner - creates detailed work plans

sisyphus-junior.description: Focused executor - executes delegated tasks without re-delegation

OpenCode-Builder.description: OpenCode's default build agent (disabled when Sisyphus is active)

prometheus.description: Pure strategist - interviews, analyzes, creates plans (READ-ONLY)

metis.description: Pre-planning consultant - identifies hidden requirements and ambiguities

momus.description: Plan reviewer - validates plans for clarity and completeness

oracle.description: Design and debugging expert - architecture consultation

librarian.description: Research specialist - official docs, open source implementations

explore.description: Fast explorer - blazing quick codebase search

multimodal-looker.description: Media analyst - extracts insights from PDFs, images, diagrams

atlas.description: Plan executor - executes Prometheus plans via delegation

visual-engineering.prompt_append: Focus on creating visually stunning, accessible, and responsive interfaces. Consider user experience, color harmony, and smooth animations.

ultrabrain.description: Deep logical reasoning, complex architecture decisions
ultrabrain.prompt_append: Think deeply and systematically. Break down complex problems into components. Consider edge cases, performance implications, and long-term maintainability.

artistry.prompt_append: Think outside the box. Explore unconventional solutions. Balance creativity with practicality.

quick.description: Trivial tasks - single file changes, typo fixes, simple modifications
quick.prompt_append: Be efficient and direct. Focus on completing the task quickly without over-engineering.

unspecified-low.description: Tasks that don't fit other categories, low effort required
unspecified-low.prompt_append: Handle general-purpose tasks efficiently. Use good judgment and follow best practices.

unspecified-high.description: Tasks that don't fit other categories, high effort required
unspecified-high.prompt_append: Thoroughly approach complex tasks. Invest time in analysis, planning, and quality implementation.

writing.prompt_append: Write clear, concise, and well-structured content. Consider your audience and maintain consistency.

deep.description: Goal-oriented autonomous problem-solving. Thorough research before action.
deep.prompt_append: Invest time in thorough research before taking action. Think systematically and consider multiple approaches.
